channel.title: zigbee on Balkian's site
channel.description: Recent content in zigbee on Balkian's site

item.title: Controlling Zigbee devices with MQTT
item.description: This is a short tutorial on connecting a zigbee device (an Aqara cube) to an MQTT server, so you can control your zigbee devices from the network. If you're anything like me, you're probably a sucker for IoT devices. For a long time, I've been using WiFi-enabled lights, and Amazon dash buttons to control them.
